_doc: THROWAWAY ground-truth spec (Phase-4 chip 3, plans/movement-system.md). Pins the cutscene->freeroam CONTROL HAND-OFF: (1) per-Flip read of the party-leader pointer *(room_state+0x200c) [room_state = *(0x8a9b50+0x2784)] -- 0 during the cutscene, non-zero once control transfers; (2) hooks the leader-SETTER 0x4c6830 (47b990/4c6830.c: swaps room_state+0x200c to the slot arg, places its entity via the mover 0x54e5c0, sets the controllable flag +0x200) to NAME the mechanism + read the new leader slot's handle/active/entity. Run: frida_capture.py --no-turbo --lockstep --seed-pin --input-trace runs/freeroam-gt/trace-retail.jsonl --field-spec tools/flow/freeroam_handoff_fields.json --field-spec-only --call-trace --capture-frames <sampled>. The durable retail_fields.json annotation lands once chip 3 is validated.

0x5b8fc0.name: flip_leader
0x5b8fc0._note: FUN_005b8fc0 DDraw Flip (once/frame). leader = *(room_state+0x200c) pointer value (hex; 0=cutscene, !=0 = control handed off). mode = base+0x1030 global game mode (47b990:722 reads ==2 to force-advance Arche).

0x4c6830.name: set_leader
0x4c6830._note: FUN_004c6830 the leader hand-off (thiscall ecx=room_state, param_1=the party slot). Sets room_state+0x200c=slot, places slot+0x9f4 entity via 0x54e5c0 with controllable flag +0x200.

fields.name: slot_handle
fields.reason: param_1+0x9f0 new-leader slot handle (0x5f5e167 = Arche/protagonist sentinel?)

fields.name: slot_entity
fields.reason: param_1+0x9f4 slot entity pointer (the controllable actor)
